message:
fix(obligation): simplify channel constructor calls to use module-level mpsc import

The send_permit::new() function was using fully-qualified crate::channel::mpsc::channel()
calls despite mpsc already being in scope via a use statement. This simplifies the two
channel creation lines to use the shorter mpsc::channel() form, matching the import style
used everywhere else in the module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
